theme.name: Playful Wonder (Moshi Kids Inspired)
theme.archetype: Archetype 6: Vibrant Play & Archetype 3: Pastel & Soft

layout_strategies.screen: Use a generous padding of 24px on horizontal edges. Avoid elements touching the screen edges unless it's a full-bleed image or banner.
layout_strategies.buttons: Large touch targets (min-height 56px), pill-shaped (borderRadius 999), bouncy scale-down animation on press. Add a 3px bottom border in a darker shade for a 3D tactile feel.
layout_strategies.cards: White or pastel backgrounds, huge border radii (24px or 32px), thick invisible borders or soft borders, heavy soft shadow.
layout_strategies.canvas: The card canvas should maintain an aspect ratio of roughly 3:4 (or widget size). Must have absolute positioned elements (text, stickers) wrapped in PanGestureHandler/RotationGestureHandler for drag, drop, resize, rotate.

components.Button: TouchableOpacity with ActiveOpacity 0.8. Give it a solid background (e.g. Teal or Pink), a 3px bottom border (darker shade of bg color) for a '3D push' effect.
components.Card: View with rounded corners (24px), background card color, padding 20px, light purple shadow.
components.TextInput: Height 56px, rounded-2xl (16px), background-color #F3E8FF (very light purple), paddingHorizontal 16px, color #1F2937, font-family Nunito, subtle border width 2px borderColor transparent, onFocus borderColor #D8B4E2.
components.Header: Large titles with Fredoka font, left aligned, generous top padding to account for safe area.

lavender_aqua_bg.description: Soft pastel lavender and aqua gradient background. Use as a default background preset for the card canvas or onboarding.

pink_yellow_bg.description: Soft pink and sunny yellow gradient background. Use as a secondary background preset for the card canvas.

star_sticker.description: 3D claymorphism star sticker for the card creator canvas.

heart_sticker.description: 3D claymorphism heart sticker for the card creator canvas.

animations.onboarding: Use standard React Native Animated or Reanimated for smooth page transitions. Bouncing effects on character or image entry.
animations.interactions: Use `react-native-reanimated` or standard `Animated` to scale buttons down by 0.95 on press-in, and back to 1 on press-out.
animations.card_receive: When a new card arrives, have a bouncy 'pop up' animation on the Home screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo app. DO NOT USE HTML, CSS, TAILWIND OR CLASSNAME. Use StyleSheet.create().
Use standard React Native primitives (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, Image, ScrollView, SafeAreaView).
Use @expo-google-fonts/fredoka and @expo-google-fonts/nunito for typography. Load them via expo-font at the root of the app.
Use react-native-gesture-handler and react-native-reanimated for the Card Canvas (drag, drop, resize, rotate).
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute for testing (e.g. data-testid="login-button").
Implement the pairing system via simple code sharing (invite code UI) since dynamic links require external setup.
Card canvas needs absolute positioning. Wrap stickers/text in gesture handlers so users can move/scale/rotate them freely.
